summary: TeacherHub frontend testing - Critical authentication issue preventing feature testing

critical_bugs.issue: Application uses Google OAuth authentication but test credentials provided are for email/password login
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot access any authenticated routes or test new features
critical_bugs.details: Login redirects to auth.emergentagent.com OAuth service, but test credentials test@school.edu/Test123! are not valid for OAuth flow

critical_bugs.issue: All routes redirect to landing page when not authenticated
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test Templates, Attendance Reports, Substitute Packet, or PDF Export features
critical_bugs.details: Routes /templates, /attendance/reports, /substitute-packet, /dashboard all show landing page content instead of feature pages

navigation_issues.issue: New navigation items not visible in sidebar
navigation_issues.impact: Cannot navigate to new features through UI
navigation_issues.details: Templates, Reports, and Substitute Packet menu items not found in navigation sidebar

passed_tests: Login form is present and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication system - either provide valid OAuth credentials for testing or implement the email/password authentication that matches the test credentials. Without proper authentication, none of the new features (Templates, Attendance Reports, Substitute Packet, PDF Export) can be tested.
success_percentage: Frontend: 0% - Cannot test any authenticated features due to authentication barrier
